commands.review_summary:
The PR changes compaction fallback results to carry typed generic-fallback metadata, stops staged summarization after two consecutive generic fallback splits, and adds focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +201. Total +237 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source, though I did not run tests in this read-only review. Current main's staged compaction calls summarizeWithFallback for each split, and summarizeChunks wraps model summarization in three retry attempts, so persistent failures repeat across splits.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining action is maintainer judgment on the session-state policy, not a narrow mechanical repair for ClawSweeper to make.
